CustomField.description:
List of Power By the Hour rent rates per the lease, used to calculate the rental income during the rent period based on usage of the asset.
For example, if 0-9 months, rate is $165, if 10-18 months, rate is $135, if 19+ months, rate is $120. The rates should be entered as 165, 135, 120 (with a comma separating each rate).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: List of PBH rent rates per the lease, used to calculate the rental income during the rent period. For example, if 0-9 months, rate is $165, if 10-18 months, rate is $135, if 19+ months, rate is $120. The rates should be entered as 165, 135, 120.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused 2001 PBH Rates
